name: ai-hands
description: Optional AI-Hands MCP plugin for current browser, Windows UIA, vision, live network inspection, and strict monitor scoping.

interface.shortDescription: Operate browser and desktop interfaces safely.
interface.longDescription: Routes current-state browser, Windows UIA, vision, monitor-scoped, and live network work through AI-Hands while keeping durable API and credential work in Workflow.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this interface, act safely, and verify the result.
Fence this automation to one monitor before acting.
